'''鈭歵h-z-v-w''' ('''kathazvewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jerk|jerk]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-v-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jerk|jerk]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-z-v-w
|-
! Lemma
| kathazvewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithazvewoko|thithazvewoko]] || [[word:jithazvewoko|jithazvewoko]] || [[word:shithazvewoko|shithazvewoko]] || [[word:kithazvewoko|kithazvewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
